printed.name: Hamstring Pull 1
printed.setup: Starting in Chest Lift position (page 17), legs together, perpendicular to Mat, hands behind calves

movement.exhale: Lower one leg to Mat, lift other leg toward chest holding calf (2 pulses)

cues: Pull gently on leg during pulses
Maintain stability of trunk and pelvis as legs change
Anchor bottom leg on Mat and keep stable (no pulses)
